metadata.task: Identify the object whose angular velocity increases when its moment of inertia decreases while angular momentum is conserved. Output the object id as one number.
metadata.description: Work from the Angular Momentum Conservation scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM identifies the free skater object and notes that conservation of angular momentum requires an increase in angular velocity when the moment of inertia decreases.
reasoning: L = Iω is constant. A decrease in I leads to an increase in ω.
